sEn: WGAN improves GAN training stability, eliminates mode collapse, and provides meaningful loss curves.
sZh: WGAN 改进了 GAN 训练的稳定性，消除了模式崩溃，并提供了有意义的损失曲线。
absEn: We introduce a new algorithm named WGAN, an alternative to traditional GAN training. In this new model, we show that we can improve the stability of learning, get rid of problems like mode collapse, and provide meaningful learning curves useful for debugging and hyperparameter searches. Furthermore, we show that the corresponding optimization problem is sound, and provide extensive theoretical work highlighting the deep connections to other distances between distributions.
absZh: 我们提出了一种名为 WGAN 的新算法，作为传统 GAN 训练的替代方案。在这个新模型中，我们展示了可以改善学习的稳定性，消除模式崩溃等问题，并提供有意义的用于调试和超参数搜索的学习曲线。此外，我们证明了相应的优化问题是合理的，并提供了广泛的理论工作，突出了与其他分布距离的深层联系。

contrib.en: Proposes WGAN using Earth Mover distance to improve training stability.
contrib.zh: 提出使用推土机距离的WGAN，提升训练稳定性。

contrib.en: Shows WGAN eliminates mode collapse and provides meaningful loss curves.
contrib.zh: 展示WGAN消除模式崩溃并提供有意义的损失曲线。

contrib.en: Proves continuity and differentiability of Wasserstein loss under mild assumptions.
contrib.zh: 证明在温和假设下Wasserstein损失的连续性和可微性。

contrib.en: Demonstrates training critic to optimality yields reliable gradients.
contrib.zh: 展示将判别器训练至最优可产生可靠梯度。

contrib.en: Provides theoretical analysis linking EM distance to other probability metrics.
contrib.zh: 提供理论分析，连接EM距离与其他概率度量。

contrib.en: Empirically validates WGAN on image generation with improved robustness.
contrib.zh: 在图像生成上实证验证WGAN，鲁棒性提升。

limits.en: Weight clipping for Lipschitz constraint is crude and may cause issues.
limits.zh: 权重裁剪实现Lipschitz约束粗糙，可能引发问题。

limits.en: WGAN unstable with momentum optimizers like Adam; requires RMSProp.
limits.zh: WGAN对动量优化器（如Adam）不稳定，需用RMSProp。

limits.en: Loss estimate scaling depends on critic architecture, limiting cross-model comparison.
limits.zh: 损失估计缩放依赖判别器架构，限制跨模型比较。

limits.en: Theoretical optimality assumes infinite critic capacity, not practical.
limits.zh: 理论最优性假设判别器无限容量，不切实际。

limits.en: Experiments limited to LSUN-Bedrooms dataset; generalizability not fully tested.
limits.zh: 实验限于LSUN-Bedrooms数据集，泛化性未充分测试。

items.en: The problem this paper is concerned with is that of unsupervised learning. Mainly, what does it mean to learn a probability distribution? The classical answer to this is to learn a probability density. This is often done by defining a parametric family of densities (Pθ)θ∈ℝdsubscriptsubscript𝑃𝜃𝜃superscriptℝ𝑑(P_{\theta})_{\theta\in\mathbb{R}^{d}} and finding the one that maximized the likelihood on our data: if we have real data examples {x(i)}i=1msuperscriptsubscriptsuperscript𝑥𝑖𝑖1𝑚\{x^{(i)}\}_{i=1}^{m}, we would solve the problem
items.zh: 本文关注的问题是无监督学习。主要探讨学习概率分布意味着什么。经典答案是学习概率密度。这通常通过定义参数化密度族 (P_θ)_{θ∈ℝ^d} 并找到使数据似然最大化的参数来实现：如果我们有真实数据样本 {x^(i)}_{i=1}^m，我们将求解问题

items.en: If the real data distribution ℙrsubscriptℙ𝑟\mathbb{P}_{r} admits a density and ℙθsubscriptℙ𝜃\mathbb{P}_{\theta} is the distribution of the parametrized density Pθsubscript𝑃𝜃P_{\theta}, then, asymptotically, this amounts to minimizing the Kullback-Leibler divergence K​L​(ℙr∥ℙθ)𝐾𝐿conditionalsubscriptℙ𝑟subscriptℙ𝜃KL(\mathbb{P}_{r}\|\mathbb{P}_{\theta}).
items.zh: 如果真实数据分布 ℙ_r 具有密度，且 ℙ_θ 是参数化密度 P_θ 的分布，那么渐近地，这等价于最小化 Kullback-Leibler 散度 KL(ℙ_r ∥ ℙ_θ)。

items.en: For this to make sense, we need the model density Pθsubscript𝑃𝜃P_{\theta} to exist. This is not the case in the rather common situation where we are dealing with distributions supported by low dimensional manifolds. It is then unlikely that the model manifold and the true distribution’s support have a non-negligible intersection (see [1]), and this means that the KL distance is not defined (or simply infinite).
items.zh: 为了使这有意义，我们需要模型密度 P_θ 存在。但在处理由低维流形支持的分布时，这种情况并不常见。此时模型流形与真实分布的支持集不太可能有非平凡交集（见 [1]），这意味着 KL 距离未定义（或无穷大）。

items.en: The typical remedy is to add a noise term to the model distribution. This is why virtually all generative models described in the classical machine learning literature include a noise component. In the simplest case, one assumes a Gaussian noise with relatively high bandwidth in order to cover all the examples. It is well known, for instance, that in the case of image generation models, this noise degrades the quality of the samples and makes them blurry. For example, we can see in the recent paper [23] that the optimal standard deviation of the noise added to the model when maximizing likelihood is around 0.1 to each pixel in a generated image, when the pixels were already normalized to be in the range [0,1]01[0,1]. This is a very high amount of noise, so much that when papers report the samples of their models, they don’t add the noise term on which they report likelihood numbers. In other words, the added noise term is clearly incorrect for the problem, but is needed to make the maximum likelihood approach work.
items.zh: 典型的补救措施是向模型分布添加噪声项。这就是为什么经典机器学习文献中描述的几乎所有生成模型都包含噪声成分。在最简单的情况下，假设具有较高带宽的高斯噪声以覆盖所有样本。众所周知，例如在图像生成模型中，这种噪声会降低样本质量并使其模糊。例如，在最近的论文 [23] 中，当像素已归一化到 [0,1] 范围时，最大化似然时添加到模型中的噪声的最优标准差约为每个像素 0.1。这是一个非常高的噪声量，以至于当论文报告模型样本时，他们不会添加报告似然数值时所依据的噪声项。换句话说，添加的噪声项显然不适合该问题，但却是使最大似然方法工作所必需的。

items.en: Rather than estimating the density of ℙrsubscriptℙ𝑟\mathbb{P}_{r} which may not exist, we can define a random variable Z𝑍Z with a fixed distribution p​(z)𝑝𝑧p(z) and pass it through a parametric function gθ:𝒵→𝒳:subscript𝑔𝜃→𝒵𝒳g_{\theta}:\mathcal{Z}\rightarrow\mathcal{X} (typically a neural network of some kind) that directly generates samples following a certain distribution ℙθsubscriptℙ𝜃\mathbb{P}_{\theta}. By varying θ𝜃\theta, we can change this distribution and make it close to the real data distribution ℙrsubscriptℙ𝑟\mathbb{P}_{r}. This is useful in two ways. First of all, unlike densities, this approach can represent distributions confined to a low dimensional manifold. Second, the ability to easily generate samples is often more useful than knowing the numerical value of the density (for example in image superresolution or semantic segmentation when considering the conditional distribution of the output image given the input image). In general, it is computationally difficult to generate samples given an arbitrary high dimensional density [16].
items.zh: 与其估计可能不存在的 ℙ_r 的密度，我们可以定义一个具有固定分布 p(z) 的随机变量 Z，并通过参数化函数 g_θ: Z → X（通常是某种神经网络）将其传递，该函数直接生成遵循特定分布 ℙ_θ 的样本。通过改变 θ，我们可以改变这个分布并使其接近真实数据分布 ℙ_r。这在两个方面很有用。首先，与密度不同，这种方法可以表示局限于低维流形的分布。其次，轻松生成样本的能力通常比知道密度的数值更有用（例如，在考虑给定输入图像时输出图像的条件分布的图像超分辨率或语义分割中）。通常，给定任意高维密度生成样本在计算上是困难的 [16]。

items.en: Variational Auto-Encoders (VAEs) [9] and Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) [4] are well known examples of this approach. Because VAEs focus on the approximate likelihood of the examples, they share the limitation of the standard models and need to fiddle with additional noise terms. GANs offer much more flexibility in the definition of the objective function, including Jensen-Shannon [4], and all f𝑓f-divergences [17] as well as some exotic combinations [6]. On the other hand, training GANs is well known for being delicate and unstable, for reasons theoretically investigated in [1].
items.zh: 变分自编码器（VAE）[9] 和生成对抗网络（GAN）[4] 是这种方法的著名例子。由于 VAE 关注样本的近似似然，它们共享标准模型的局限性，需要处理额外的噪声项。GAN 在目标函数的定义上提供了更大的灵活性，包括 Jensen-Shannon [4] 和所有 f-散度 [17] 以及一些奇特的组合 [6]。另一方面，训练 GAN 以其精细和不稳定而闻名，其原因在 [1] 中进行了理论研究。

items.en: In this paper, we direct our attention on the various ways to measure how close the model distribution and the real distribution are, or equivalently, on the various ways to define a distance or divergence ρ​(ℙθ,ℙr)𝜌subscriptℙ𝜃subscriptℙ𝑟\rho(\mathbb{P}_{\theta},\mathbb{P}_{r}). The most fundamental difference between such distances is their impact on the convergence of sequences of probability distributions. A sequence of distributions (ℙt)t∈ℕsubscriptsubscriptℙ𝑡𝑡ℕ(\mathbb{P}_{t})_{t\in\mathbb{N}} converges if and only if there is a distribution ℙ∞subscriptℙ\mathbb{P}_{\infty} such that ρ​(ℙt,ℙ∞)𝜌subscriptℙ𝑡subscriptℙ\rho(\mathbb{P}_{t},\mathbb{P}_{\infty}) tends to zero, something that depends on how exactly the distance ρ𝜌\rho is defined. Informally, a distance ρ𝜌\rho induces a weaker topology when it makes it easier for a sequence of distribution to converge.111More exactly, the topology induced by ρ𝜌\rho is weaker than that induced by ρ′superscript𝜌′\rho^{\prime} when the set of convergent sequences under ρ𝜌\rho is a superset of that under ρ′superscript𝜌′\rho^{\prime}. Section 2 clarifies how popular probability distances differ in that respect.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们关注衡量模型分布与真实分布接近程度的各种方法，或者等价地，定义距离或散度 ρ(ℙ_θ, ℙ_r) 的各种方法。这些距离之间最根本的区别在于它们对概率分布序列收敛性的影响。当且仅当存在分布 ℙ_∞ 使得 ρ(ℙ_t, ℙ_∞) 趋于零时，分布序列 (ℙ_t)_{t∈ℕ} 收敛，这取决于距离 ρ 的具体定义。非正式地说，当距离 ρ 使分布序列更容易收敛时，它诱导出更弱的拓扑。1更准确地说，当 ρ 下的收敛序列集是 ρ' 下的收敛序列集的超集时，ρ 诱导的拓扑弱于 ρ' 诱导的拓扑。第 2 节阐明了流行的概率距离在这方面有何不同。

items.en: In order to optimize the parameter θ𝜃\theta, it is of course desirable to define our model distribution ℙθsubscriptℙ𝜃\mathbb{P}_{\theta} in a manner that makes the mapping θ↦ℙθmaps-to𝜃subscriptℙ𝜃\theta\mapsto\mathbb{P}_{\theta} continuous. Continuity means that when a sequence of parameters θtsubscript𝜃𝑡\theta_{t} converges to θ𝜃\theta, the distributions ℙθtsubscriptℙsubscript𝜃𝑡\mathbb{P}_{\theta_{t}} also converge to ℙθsubscriptℙ𝜃\mathbb{P}_{\theta}. However, it is essential to remember that the notion of the convergence of the distributions ℙθtsubscriptℙsubscript𝜃𝑡\mathbb{P}_{\theta_{t}} depends on the way we compute the distance between distributions. The weaker this distance, the easier it is to define a continuous mapping from θ𝜃\theta-space to ℙθsubscriptℙ𝜃\mathbb{P}_{\theta}-space, since it’s easier for the distributions to converge. The main reason we care about the mapping θ↦ℙθmaps-to𝜃subscriptℙ𝜃\theta\mapsto\mathbb{P}_{\theta} to be continuous is as follows. If ρ𝜌\rho is our notion of distance between two distributions, we would like to have a loss function θ↦ρ​(ℙθ,ℙr)maps-to𝜃𝜌subscriptℙ𝜃subscriptℙ𝑟\theta\mapsto\rho(\mathbb{P}_{\theta},\mathbb{P}_{r}) that is continuous, and this is equivalent to having the mapping θ↦ℙθmaps-to𝜃subscriptℙ𝜃\theta\mapsto\mathbb{P}_{\theta} be continuous when using the distance between distributions ρ𝜌\rho.
items.zh: 为了优化参数 θ，当然希望以使得映射 θ ↦ ℙ_θ 连续的方式定义我们的模型分布 ℙ_θ。连续性意味着当参数序列 θ_t 收敛到 θ 时，分布 ℙ_{θ_t} 也收敛到 ℙ_θ。然而，必须记住分布 ℙ_{θ_t} 的收敛概念取决于我们计算分布之间距离的方式。距离越弱，就越容易定义从 θ-空间到 ℙ_θ-空间的连续映射，因为分布更容易收敛。我们关心映射 θ ↦ ℙ_θ 连续的主要原因是：如果 ρ 是我们对两个分布之间距离的概念，我们希望损失函数 θ ↦ ρ(ℙ_θ, ℙ_r) 是连续的，这等价于在使用分布间距离 ρ 时映射 θ ↦ ℙ_θ 是连续的。

items.en: In Section 2, we provide a comprehensive theoretical analysis of how the Earth Mover (EM) distance behaves in comparison to popular probability distances and divergences used in the context of learning distributions.
items.zh: 在第 2 节中，我们提供了关于 Earth Mover (EM) 距离与学习分布中使用的流行概率距离和散度相比如何行为的全面理论分析。

items.en: In Section 3, we define a form of GAN called Wasserstein-GAN that minimizes a reasonable and efficient approximation of the EM distance, and we theoretically show that the corresponding optimization problem is sound.
items.zh: 在第 3 节中，我们定义了一种称为 Wasserstein-GAN 的 GAN 形式，它最小化 EM 距离的合理且高效的近似，并从理论上证明相应的优化问题是合理的。

items.en: In Section 4, we empirically show that WGANs cure the main training problems of GANs. In particular, training WGANs does not require maintaining a careful balance in training of the discriminator and the generator, and does not require a careful design of the network architecture either. The mode dropping phenomenon that is typical in GANs is also drastically reduced. One of the most compelling practical benefits of WGANs is the ability to continuously estimate the EM distance by training the discriminator to optimality. Plotting these learning curves is not only useful for debugging and hyperparameter searches, but also correlate remarkably well with the observed sample quality.
items.zh: 在第 4 节中，我们经验性地表明 WGAN 解决了 GAN 的主要训练问题。特别是，训练 WGAN 不需要在判别器和生成器的训练中保持仔细的平衡，也不需要仔细设计网络架构。GAN 中典型的模式崩溃现象也显著减少。WGAN 最引人注目的实际优势之一是能够通过训练判别器达到最优来连续估计 EM 距离。绘制这些学习曲线不仅有助于调试和超参数搜索，而且与观察到的样本质量具有显著的相关性。

items.en: Example 1 gives us a case where we can learn a probability distribution over a low dimensional manifold by doing gradient descent on the EM distance. This cannot be done with the other distances and divergences because the resulting loss function is not even continuous. Although this simple example features distributions with disjoint supports, the same conclusion holds when the supports have a non empty intersection contained in a set of measure zero. This happens to be the case when two low dimensional manifolds intersect in general position [1].
items.zh: 例1给出了一个情况，我们可以通过EM距离上的梯度下降来学习低维流形上的概率分布。这无法用其他距离和散度实现，因为由此产生的损失函数甚至不连续。尽管这个简单例子中的分布具有不相交的支撑集，但当支撑集在零测集上有非空交集时，同样的结论也成立。当两个低维流形在一般位置上相交时，就会出现这种情况[1]。

The Wasserstein Generative Adversarial Network (WGAN) procedure is described in Algorithm 1.

items.en: Weight clipping is a clearly terrible way to enforce a Lipschitz constraint. If the clipping parameter is large, then it can take a long time for any weights to reach their limit, thereby making it harder to train the critic till optimality. If the clipping is small, this can easily lead to vanishing gradients when the number of layers is big, or batch normalization is not used (such as in RNNs). We experimented with simple variants (such as projecting the weights to a sphere) with little difference, and we stuck with weight clipping due to its simplicity and already good performance. However, we do leave the topic of enforcing Lipschitz constraints in a neural network setting for further investigation, and we actively encourage interested researchers to improve on this method.
items.zh: 权重裁剪显然是实施Lipschitz约束的一种糟糕方式。如果裁剪参数很大，那么任何权重可能需要很长时间才能达到其极限，从而使训练评论家达到最优更加困难。如果裁剪很小，当层数较多或未使用批归一化（如RNN中）时，这很容易导致梯度消失。我们尝试了简单的变体（例如将权重投影到球面），但差异很小，由于简单且性能已经良好，我们坚持使用权重裁剪。然而，我们将神经网络中实施Lipschitz约束的主题留待进一步研究，并积极鼓励感兴趣的研究者改进这种方法。

items.en: The fact that the EM distance is continuous and differentiable a.e. means that we can (and should) train the critic till optimality. The argument is simple, the more we train the critic, the more reliable gradient of the Wasserstein we get, which is actually useful by the fact that Wasserstein is differentiable almost everywhere. For the JS, as the discriminator gets better the gradients get more reliable but the true gradient is 0 since the JS is locally saturated and we get vanishing gradients, as can be seen in Figure 1 of this paper and Theorem 2.4 of [1]. In Figure 2 we show a proof of concept of this, where we train a GAN discriminator and a WGAN critic till optimality. The discriminator learns very quickly to distinguish between fake and real, and as expected provides no reliable gradient information. The critic, however, can’t saturate, and converges to a linear function that gives remarkably clean gradients everywhere. The fact that we constrain the weights limits the possible growth of the function to be at most linear in different parts of the space, forcing the optimal critic to have this behaviour.
items.zh: EM距离几乎处处连续且可微的事实意味着我们可以（并且应该）训练评论家直到最优。论点很简单，我们训练评论家越多，得到的Wasserstein梯度就越可靠，而由于Wasserstein几乎处处可微，这实际上是有用的。对于JS，随着判别器变得更好，梯度变得更可靠，但真实梯度为0，因为JS局部饱和，我们得到消失的梯度，如本文图1和[1]的定理2.4所示。在图2中，我们展示了这一点的概念验证，我们训练一个GAN判别器和一个WGAN评论家直到最优。判别器很快学会区分真假，并且如预期那样不提供可靠的梯度信息。然而，评论家不会饱和，而是收敛到一个线性函数，在所有地方都提供非常清晰的梯度。我们约束权重的事实限制了函数在不同空间区域的可能增长最多是线性的，迫使最优评论家具有这种行为。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Optimal discriminator and critic when learning to differentiate two Gaussians. As we can see, the discriminator of a minimax GAN saturates and results in vanishing gradients. Our WGAN critic provides very clean gradients on all parts of the space.
items.capZh: 图2：在学习区分两个高斯分布时的最优判别器和评论家。正如我们所见，极小极大GAN的判别器饱和并导致梯度消失。我们的WGAN评论家在所有空间区域提供非常清晰的梯度。

items.en: Perhaps more importantly, the fact that we can train the critic till optimality makes it impossible to collapse modes when we do. This is due to the fact that mode collapse comes from the fact that the optimal generator for a fixed discriminator is a sum of deltas on the points the discriminator assigns the highest values, as observed by [4] and highlighted in [11].
items.zh: 也许更重要的是，我们可以训练评论家直到最优这一事实使得我们在这样做时不可能发生模式崩溃。这是因为模式崩溃源于这样一个事实：对于固定判别器的最优生成器是在判别器赋予最高值的点上的delta函数之和，如[4]所观察并在[11]中强调的那样。

items.en: In the following section we display the practical benefits of our new algorithm, and we provide an in-depth comparison of its behaviour and that of traditional GANs.
items.zh: 在下一节中，我们展示新算法的实际好处，并对其行为与传统GAN进行深入比较。

items.en: We run experiments on image generation using our Wasserstein-GAN algorithm and show that there are significant practical benefits to using it over the formulation used in standard GANs.
items.zh: 我们使用Wasserstein-GAN算法进行图像生成实验，并表明使用它比标准GAN中的公式有显著的实际好处。

items.en: a meaningful loss metric that correlates with the generator’s convergence and sample quality
items.zh: 一个有意义的损失度量，与生成器的收敛性和样本质量相关

items.en: improved stability of the optimization process
items.zh: 优化过程的稳定性提高

items.en: We run experiments on image generation. The target distribution to learn is the LSUN-Bedrooms dataset [24] – a collection of natural images of indoor bedrooms. Our baseline comparison is DCGAN [18], a GAN with a convolutional architecture trained with the standard GAN procedure using the −log⁡D𝐷-\log D trick [4]. The generated samples are 3-channel images of 64x64 pixels in size. We use the hyper-parameters specified in Algorithm 1 for all of our experiments.
items.zh: 我们进行图像生成实验。要学习的目标分布是LSUN-Bedrooms数据集[24]——室内卧室的自然图像集合。我们的基线比较是DCGAN[18]，一种使用标准GAN程序并采用-log D技巧[4]训练的卷积架构GAN。生成的样本是64x64像素的3通道图像。我们在所有实验中使用算法1中指定的超参数。

items.en: Because the WGAN algorithm attempts to train the critic f𝑓f (lines 2–8 in Algorithm 1) relatively well before each generator update (line 10 in Algorithm 1), the loss function at this point is an estimate of the EM distance, up to constant factors related to the way we constrain the Lipschitz constant of f𝑓f.
items.zh: 由于WGAN算法试图在每次生成器更新（算法1第10行）之前相对较好地训练评论家f（算法1第2-8行），此时的损失函数是EM距离的估计，相差与约束f的Lipschitz常数方式相关的常数因子。

items.en: Our first experiment illustrates how this estimate correlates well with the quality of the generated samples. Besides the convolutional DCGAN architecture, we also ran experiments where we replace the generator or both the generator and the critic by 4-layer ReLU-MLP with 512 hidden units.
items.zh: 我们的第一个实验说明了这个估计与生成样本质量的相关性。除了卷积DCGAN架构，我们还进行了实验，将生成器或生成器和评论家都替换为具有512个隐藏单元的4层ReLU-MLP。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Training curves and samples at different stages of training. We can see a clear correlation between lower error and better sample quality. Upper left: the generator is an MLP with 4 hidden layers and 512 units at each layer. The loss decreases constistently as training progresses and sample quality increases. Upper right: the generator is a standard DCGAN. The loss decreases quickly and sample quality increases as well. In both upper plots the critic is a DCGAN without the sigmoid so losses can be subjected to comparison. Lower half: both the generator and the discriminator are MLPs with substantially high learning rates (so training failed). Loss is constant and samples are constant as well. The training curves were passed through a median filter for visualization purposes.
items.capZh: 图3：不同训练阶段的训练曲线和样本。我们可以看到较低误差与较好样本质量之间的明显相关性。左上：生成器是具有4个隐藏层、每层512个单元的MLP。随着训练进行，损失持续下降，样本质量提高。右上：生成器是标准DCGAN。损失迅速下降，样本质量也提高。在两个上图中，评论家是没有sigmoid的DCGAN，因此损失可以进行比较。下半部分：生成器和判别器都是MLP，学习率相当高（因此训练失败）。损失恒定，样本也恒定。训练曲线经过中值滤波以便可视化。

items.capEn: Figure 4: J​S𝐽𝑆JS estimates for an MLP generator (upper left) and a DCGAN generator (upper right) trained with the standard GAN procedure. Both had a DCGAN discriminator. Both curves have increasing error. Samples get better for the DCGAN but the JS estimate increases or stays constant, pointing towards no significant correlation between sample quality and loss. Bottom: M​L​P𝑀𝐿𝑃MLP with both generator and discriminator. The curve goes up and down regardless of sample quality. All training curves were passed through the same median filter as in Figure 3.
items.capZh: 图4：使用标准GAN程序训练的MLP生成器（左上）和DCGAN生成器（右上）的JS估计。两者都有DCGAN判别器。两条曲线误差增加。DCGAN的样本变好，但JS估计增加或保持不变，表明样本质量与损失之间没有显著相关性。底部：生成器和判别器都是MLP。曲线上下波动，与样本质量无关。所有训练曲线都经过与图3相同的中值滤波。

items.en: To our knowledge, this is the first time in GAN literature that such a property is shown, where the loss of the GAN shows properties of convergence. This property is extremely useful when doing research in adversarial networks as one does not need to stare at the generated samples to figure out failure modes and to gain information on which models are doing better over others.
items.zh: 据我们所知，这是GAN文献中首次展示这样的性质，即GAN的损失显示出收敛性质。这一性质在对抗网络研究中非常有用，因为人们无需盯着生成的样本就能找出失败模式，并获取关于哪些模型比其他模型更好的信息。

items.en: However, we do not claim that this is a new method to quantitatively evaluate generative models yet. The constant scaling factor that depends on the critic’s architecture means it’s hard to compare models with different critics. Even more, in practice the fact that the critic doesn’t have infinite capacity makes it hard to know just how close to the EM distance our estimate really is. This being said, we have succesfully used the loss metric to validate our experiments repeatedly and without failure, and we see this as a huge improvement in training GANs which previously had no such facility.
items.zh: 然而，我们并不声称这是一种定量评估生成模型的新方法。依赖于评论家架构的常数缩放因子意味着很难比较使用不同评论家的模型。更甚者，在实践中，评论家没有无限容量这一事实使得我们很难知道我们的估计究竟有多接近EM距离。尽管如此，我们已成功使用损失度量反复且无故障地验证了我们的实验，我们认为这是训练GAN的一大改进，因为之前没有这样的工具。

items.en: In contrast, Figure 4 plots the evolution of the GAN estimate of the JS distance during GAN training. More precisely, during GAN training, the discriminator is trained to maximize
items.zh: 相比之下，图4绘制了GAN训练期间JS距离的GAN估计的演变。更准确地说，在GAN训练期间，判别器被训练以最大化

items.en: which is is a lower bound of 2​J​S​(ℙr,ℙθ)−2​log⁡22𝐽𝑆subscriptℙ𝑟subscriptℙ𝜃222JS(\mathbb{P}_{r},\mathbb{P}_{\theta})-2\log 2. In the figure, we plot the quantity 12​L​(D,gθ)+log⁡212𝐿𝐷subscript𝑔𝜃2\frac{1}{2}L(D,g_{\theta})+\log 2, which is a lower bound of the JS distance.
items.zh: 这是2JS(ℙ_r,ℙ_θ)−2log2的一个下界。在图中，我们绘制了量1/2 L(D,g_θ)+log2，它是JS距离的一个下界。

items.en: This quantity clearly correlates poorly the sample quality. Note also that the JS estimate usually stays constant or goes up instead of going down. In fact it often remains very close to log⁡2≈0.6920.69\log 2\approx 0.69 which is the highest value taken by the JS distance. In other words, the JS distance saturates, the discriminator has zero loss, and the generated samples are in some cases meaningful (DCGAN generator, top right plot) and in other cases collapse to a single nonsensical image [4]. This last phenomenon has been theoretically explained in [1] and highlighted in [11].
items.zh: 该量与样本质量的相关性明显很差。还要注意，JS估计通常保持不变或上升而不是下降。事实上，它通常非常接近log2≈0.69，这是JS距离的最大值。换句话说，JS距离饱和，判别器损失为零，生成的样本在某些情况下有意义（DCGAN生成器，右上图），而在其他情况下则坍缩为单个无意义的图像[4]。最后一种现象已在[1]中从理论上解释，并在[11]中强调。

items.en: When using the −log⁡D𝐷-\log D trick [4], the discriminator loss and the generator loss are different. Figure 8 in Appendix E reports the same plots for GAN training, but using the generator loss instead of the discriminator loss. This does not change the conclusions.
items.zh: 当使用−log D技巧[4]时，判别器损失和生成器损失是不同的。附录E中的图8报告了GAN训练的相同图，但使用生成器损失而不是判别器损失。这不会改变结论。

items.en: Finally, as a negative result, we report that WGAN training becomes unstable at times when one uses a momentum based optimizer such as Adam [8] (with β1>0subscript𝛽10\beta_{1}>0) on the critic, or when one uses high learning rates. Since the loss for the critic is nonstationary, momentum based methods seemed to perform worse. We identified momentum as a potential cause because, as the loss blew up and samples got worse, the cosine between the Adam step and the gradient usually turned negative. The only places where this cosine was negative was in these situations of instability. We therefore switched to RMSProp [21] which is known to perform well even on very nonstationary problems [13].
items.zh: 最后，作为一个负面结果，我们报告当在评论家上使用基于动量的优化器如Adam [8]（β1>0）或使用高学习率时，WGAN训练有时会变得不稳定。由于评论家的损失是非平稳的，基于动量的方法似乎表现更差。我们将动量识别为潜在原因，因为当损失激增且样本变差时，Adam步与梯度之间的余弦通常变为负值。唯一出现余弦为负的情况正是这些不稳定的情况。因此，我们切换到RMSProp [21]，它即使在非常非平稳的问题上也表现良好[13]。

items.en: One of the benefits of WGAN is that it allows us to train the critic till optimality. When the critic is trained to completion, it simply provides a loss to the generator that we can train as any other neural network. This tells us that we no longer need to balance generator and discriminator’s capacity properly. The better the critic, the higher quality the gradients we use to train the generator.
items.zh: WGAN的一个好处是它允许我们将评论家训练到最优。当评论家训练完成时，它只是为生成器提供一个损失，我们可以像训练任何其他神经网络一样训练生成器。这告诉我们，我们不再需要适当平衡生成器和判别器的容量。评论家越好，用于训练生成器的梯度质量就越高。

items.en: We observe that WGANs are much more robust than GANs when one varies the architectural choices for the generator. We illustrate this by running experiments on three generator architectures: (1) a convolutional DCGAN generator, (2) a convolutional DCGAN generator without batch normalization and with a constant number of filters, and (3) a 4-layer ReLU-MLP with 512 hidden units. The last two are known to perform very poorly with GANs. We keep the convolutional DCGAN architecture for the WGAN critic or the GAN discriminator.
items.zh: 我们观察到，当改变生成器的架构选择时，WGAN比GAN更加鲁棒。我们通过在三种生成器架构上运行实验来说明这一点：（1）卷积DCGAN生成器，（2）没有批归一化且滤波器数量恒定的卷积DCGAN生成器，以及（3）具有512个隐藏单元的4层ReLU-MLP。已知后两种在GAN中表现非常差。我们为WGAN评论家或GAN判别器保留卷积DCGAN架构。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Algorithms trained with a DCGAN generator. Left: WGAN algorithm. Right: standard GAN formulation. Both algorithms produce high quality samples.
items.capZh: 图5：使用DCGAN生成器训练的算法。左：WGAN算法。右：标准GAN公式。两种算法都产生高质量样本。

items.en: In no experiment did we see evidence of mode collapse for the WGAN algorithm.
items.zh: 在任何实验中，我们都没有看到WGAN算法出现模式坍缩的证据。

items.en: There’s been a number of works on the so called Integral Probability Metrics (IPMs) [15]. Given ℱℱ\mathcal{F} a set of functions from 𝒳𝒳\mathcal{X} to ℝℝ\mathbb{R}, we can define
items.zh: 已有大量关于所谓积分概率度量（IPM）[15]的工作。给定F一个从X到R的函数集，我们可以定义

items.en: as an integral probability metric associated with the function class ℱℱ\mathcal{F}. It is easily verified that if for every f∈ℱ𝑓ℱf\in\mathcal{F} we have −f∈ℱ𝑓ℱ-f\in\mathcal{F} (such as all examples we’ll consider), then dℱsubscript𝑑ℱd_{\mathcal{F}} is nonnegative, satisfies the triangular inequality, and is symmetric. Thus, dℱsubscript𝑑ℱd_{\mathcal{F}} is a pseudometric over Prob​(𝒳)Prob𝒳\text{Prob}(\mathcal{X}).
items.zh: 为与函数类F相关的积分概率度量。容易验证，如果对于每个f∈F，有−f∈F（如我们将考虑的所有例子），则d_F是非负的，满足三角不等式，并且是对称的。因此，d_F是Prob(X)上的一个伪度量。

items.en: While IPMs might seem to share a similar formula, as we will see different classes of functions can yeald to radically different metrics.
items.zh: 虽然IPM可能看起来共享相似的公式，但正如我们将看到的，不同的函数类可以产生截然不同的度量。

items.en: By the Kantorovich-Rubinstein duality [22], we know that W​(ℙr,ℙθ)=dℱ​(ℙr,ℙθ)𝑊subscriptℙ𝑟subscriptℙ𝜃subscript𝑑ℱsubscriptℙ𝑟subscriptℙ𝜃W(\mathbb{P}_{r},\mathbb{P}_{\theta})=d_{\mathcal{F}}(\mathbb{P}_{r},\mathbb{P}_{\theta}) when ℱℱ\mathcal{F} is the set of 1-Lipschitz functions. Furthermore, if ℱℱ\mathcal{F} is the set of K𝐾K-Lipschitz functions, we get K⋅W​(ℙr,ℙθ)=dℱ​(ℙr,ℙθ)⋅𝐾𝑊subscriptℙ𝑟subscriptℙ𝜃subscript𝑑ℱsubscriptℙ𝑟subscriptℙ𝜃K\cdot W(\mathbb{P}_{r},\mathbb{P}_{\theta})=d_{\mathcal{F}}(\mathbb{P}_{r},\mathbb{P}_{\theta}).
items.zh: 根据Kantorovich-Rubinstein对偶[22]，我们知道当F是1-Lipschitz函数集时，W(ℙ_r,ℙ_θ)=d_F(ℙ_r,ℙ_θ)。此外，如果F是K-Lipschitz函数集，则得到K·W(ℙ_r,ℙ_θ)=d_F(ℙ_r,ℙ_θ)。

items.en: When ℱℱ\mathcal{F} is the set of all measurable functions bounded between -1 and 1 (or all continuous functions between -1 and 1), we retrieve dℱ​(ℙr,ℙθ)=δ​(ℙr,ℙθ)subscript𝑑ℱsubscriptℙ𝑟subscriptℙ𝜃𝛿subscriptℙ𝑟subscriptℙ𝜃d_{\mathcal{F}}(\mathbb{P}_{r},\mathbb{P}_{\theta})=\delta(\mathbb{P}_{r},\mathbb{P}_{\theta}) the total variation distance [15]. This already tells us that going from 1-Lipschitz to 1-Bounded functions drastically changes the topology of the space, and the regularity of dℱ​(ℙr,ℙθ)subscript𝑑ℱsubscriptℙ𝑟subscriptℙ𝜃d_{\mathcal{F}}(\mathbb{P}_{r},\mathbb{P}_{\theta}) as a loss function (as by Theorems 1 and 2).
items.zh: 当F是所有介于-1和1之间的可测函数（或所有介于-1和1之间的连续函数）的集合时，我们得到d_F(ℙ_r,ℙ_θ)=δ(ℙ_r,ℙ_θ)，即总变差距离[15]。这已经告诉我们，从1-Lipschitz到1-有界函数会急剧改变空间的拓扑结构，以及d_F(ℙ_r,ℙ_θ)作为损失函数的正则性（如定理1和2所示）。

items.en: Energy-based GANs (EBGANs) [25] can be thought of as the generative approach to the total variation distance. This connection is stated and proven in depth in Appendix Appendix D. At the core of the connection is that the discriminator will play the role of f𝑓f maximizing equation (4) while its only restriction is being between 00 and m𝑚m for some constant m𝑚m. This will yeald the same behaviour as being restricted to be between −11-1 and 111 up to a constant scaling factor irrelevant to optimization. Thus, when the discriminator approaches optimality the cost for the generator will aproximate the total variation distance δ​(ℙr,ℙθ)𝛿subscriptℙ𝑟subscriptℙ𝜃\delta(\mathbb{P}_{r},\mathbb{P}_{\theta}).
items.zh: 基于能量的GAN（EBGAN）[25]可以被视为总变差距离的生成方法。这一联系在附录D中进行了深入陈述和证明。该联系的核心在于，判别器将扮演f的角色，最大化方程（4），而其唯一限制是介于0和某个常数m之间。这将产生与限制在-1和1之间相同的行为，除了一个与优化无关的常数缩放因子。因此，当判别器接近最优时，生成器的成本将近似于总变差距离δ(ℙ_r,ℙ_θ)。

items.en: Since the total variation distance displays the same regularity as the JS, it can be seen that EBGANs will suffer from the same problems of classical GANs regarding not being able to train the discriminator till optimality and thus limiting itself to very imperfect gradients.
items.zh: 由于总变差距离表现出与JS相同的正则性，可以看出EBGAN将遭受与经典GAN相同的问题，即无法将判别器训练到最优，从而限制其使用非常不完美的梯度。

items.en: Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) [5] is a specific case of integral probability metrics when ℱ={f∈ℋ:‖f‖∞≤1}ℱconditional-set𝑓ℋsubscriptnorm𝑓1\mathcal{F}=\{f\in\mathcal{H}:\|f\|_{\infty}\leq 1\} for ℋℋ\mathcal{H} some Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS) associated with a given kernel k:𝒳×𝒳→ℝ:𝑘→𝒳𝒳ℝk:\mathcal{X}\times\mathcal{X}\rightarrow\mathbb{R}. As proved on [5] we know that MMD is a proper metric and not only a pseudometric when the kernel is universal. In the specific case where ℋ=L2​(𝒳,m)ℋsuperscript𝐿2𝒳𝑚\mathcal{H}=L^{2}(\mathcal{X},m) for m𝑚m the normalized Lebesgue measure on 𝒳𝒳\mathcal{X}, we know that {f∈Cb​(𝒳),‖f‖∞≤1}formulae-sequence𝑓subscript𝐶𝑏𝒳subscriptnorm𝑓1\{f\in C_{b}(\mathcal{X}),\|f\|_{\infty}\leq 1\} will be contained in ℱℱ\mathcal{F}, and therefore dℱ​(ℙr,ℙθ)≤δ​(ℙr,ℙθ)subscript𝑑ℱsubscriptℙ𝑟subscriptℙ𝜃𝛿subscriptℙ𝑟subscriptℙ𝜃d_{\mathcal{F}}(\mathbb{P}_{r},\mathbb{P}_{\theta})\leq\delta(\mathbb{P}_{r},\mathbb{P}_{\theta}) so the regularity of the MMD distance as a loss function will be at least as bad as the one of the total variation. Nevertheless this is a very extreme case, since we would need a very powerful kernel to approximate the whole L2superscript𝐿2L^{2}. However, even Gaussian kernels are able to detect tiny noise patterns as recently evidenced by [20]. This points to the fact that especially with low bandwidth kernels, the distance might be close to a saturating regime similar as with total variation or the JS. This obviously doesn’t need to be the case for every kernel, and figuring out how and which different MMDs are closer to Wasserstein or total variation distances is an interesting topic of research.
items.zh: 最大均值差异（MMD）[5]是积分概率度量的一个特例，其中F={f∈H: ‖f‖_∞≤1}，H是某个与给定核k: X×X→R相关的再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）。如[5]所证明，我们知道当核是普及时，MMD是一个真正的度量而不仅仅是伪度量。在特定情况下，当H=L^2(X,m)，m是X上的归一化勒贝格测度时，我们知道{f∈C_b(X), ‖f‖_∞≤1}将包含在F中，因此d_F(ℙ_r,ℙ_θ)≤δ(ℙ_r,ℙ_θ)，所以MMD距离作为损失函数的正则性至少与总变差一样差。然而，这是一个非常极端的情况，因为我们需要一个非常强大的核来近似整个L^2。但是，即使是高斯核也能检测到微小的噪声模式，正如[20]最近所证明的。这表明，特别是对于低带宽核，距离可能接近类似于总变差或JS的饱和状态。这显然不一定适用于每个核，弄清楚不同的MMD如何以及哪些更接近Wasserstein或总变差距离是一个有趣的研究课题。

items.en: The great aspect of MMD is that via the kernel trick there is no need to train a separate network to maximize equation (4) for the ball of a RKHS. However, this has the disadvantage that evaluating the MMD distance has computational cost that grows quadratically with the amount of samples used to estimate the expectations in (4). This last point makes MMD have limited scalability, and is sometimes inapplicable to many real life applications because of it. There are estimates with linear computational cost for the MMD [5] which in a lot of cases makes MMD very useful, but they also have worse sample complexity.
items.zh: MMD的一大优点是，通过核技巧，无需训练单独的网络来最大化RKHS球的方程（4）。然而，这也有缺点，即评估MMD距离的计算成本随用于估计（4）中期望的样本数量呈二次增长。最后一点使得MMD的可扩展性有限，有时因此无法应用于许多实际应用。存在MMD的线性计算成本估计[5]，这在很多情况下使MMD非常有用，但它们的样本复杂度也更差。

items.en: Generative Moment Matching Networks (GMMNs) [10, 2] are the generative counterpart of MMD. By backproping through the kernelized formula for equation (4), they directly optimize dM​M​D​(ℙr,ℙθ)subscript𝑑𝑀𝑀𝐷subscriptℙ𝑟subscriptℙ𝜃d_{MMD}(\mathbb{P}_{r},\mathbb{P}_{\theta}) (the IPM when ℱℱ\mathcal{F} is as in the previous item). As mentioned, this has the advantage of not requiring a separate network to approximately maximize equation (4). However, GMMNs have enjoyed limited applicability. Partial explanations for their unsuccess are the quadratic cost as a function of the number of samples and vanishing gradients for low-bandwidth kernels. Furthermore, it may be possible that some kernels used in practice are unsuitable for capturing very complex distances in high dimensional sample spaces such as natural images. This is properly justified by the fact that [19] shows that for the typical Gaussian MMD test to be reliable (as in it’s power as a statistical test approaching 1), we need the number of samples to grow linearly with the number of dimensions. Since the MMD computational cost grows quadratically with the number of samples in the batch used to estimate equation (4), this makes the cost of having a reliable estimator grow quadratically with the number of dimensions, which makes it very inapplicable for high dimensional problems. Indeed, for something as standard as 646464x646464 images, we would need minibatches of size at least 409640964096 (without taking into account the constants in the bounds of [19] which would make this number substantially larger) and a total cost per iteration of 40962superscript409624096^{2}, over 5 orders of magnitude more than a GAN iteration when using the standard batch size of 64.
items.zh: 生成矩匹配网络（GMMN）[10, 2]是MMD的生成对应物。通过对方程（4）的核化公式进行反向传播，它们直接优化d_MMD(ℙ_r,ℙ_θ)（当F如前一项所述时的IPM）。如前所述，这具有不需要单独网络来近似最大化方程（4）的优点。然而，GMMN的适用性有限。对其不成功的部分解释是作为样本数量函数的二次成本以及低带宽核的梯度消失。此外，可能实践中使用的一些核不适合捕捉高维样本空间（如自然图像）中非常复杂的距离。这由[19]的结果合理证明，该结果表明，对于典型的高斯MMD检验要可靠（即其作为统计检验的功效接近1），我们需要样本数量随维度数量线性增长。由于MMD的计算成本随用于估计方程（4）的批次中的样本数量二次增长，这使得可靠估计器的成本随维度数量二次增长，从而使其非常不适用于高维问题。实际上，对于像64x64图像这样标准的问题，我们需要至少4096大小的minibatch（不考虑[19]界限中的常数，这些常数会使这个数字更大），每次迭代的总成本为4096^2，比使用标准批次大小64的GAN迭代高出5个数量级以上。

items.en: That being said, these numbers can be a bit unfair to the MMD, in the sense that we are comparing empirical sample complexity of GANs with the theoretical sample complexity of MMDs, which tends to be worse. However, in the original GMMN paper [10] they indeed used a minibatch of size 1000, much larger than the standard 32 or 64 (even when this incurred in quadratic computational cost). While estimates that have linear computational cost as a function of the number of samples exist [5], they have worse sample complexity, and to the best of our knowledge they haven’t been yet applied in a generative context such as in GMMNs.
items.zh: 话虽如此，这些数字对MMD可能有些不公平，因为我们是在比较GAN的经验样本复杂度与MMD的理论样本复杂度，后者往往更差。然而，在原始的GMMN论文[10]中，他们确实使用了大小为1000的小批量，远大于标准的32或64（即使这导致了二次计算成本）。虽然存在计算成本随样本数量线性增长的估计方法[5]，但它们的样本复杂度更差，而且据我们所知，它们尚未被应用于像GMMN这样的生成场景中。

items.en: On another great line of research, the recent work of [14] has explored the use of Wasserstein distances in the context of learning for Restricted Boltzmann Machines for discrete spaces. The motivations at a first glance might seem quite different, since the manifold setting is restricted to continuous spaces and in finite discrete spaces the weak and strong topologies (the ones of W and JS respectively) coincide. However, in the end there is more in commmon than not about our motivations. We both want to compare distributions in a way that leverages the geometry of the underlying space, and Wasserstein allows us to do exactly that.
items.zh: 在另一条重要的研究方向上，[14]的最新工作探索了在离散空间的受限玻尔兹曼机学习中使用Wasserstein距离。乍一看，动机可能截然不同，因为流形设置仅限于连续空间，而在有限离散空间中，弱拓扑和强拓扑（分别对应W和JS的拓扑）是重合的。然而，最终我们的动机共同点多于不同点。我们都希望以利用底层空间几何的方式比较分布，而Wasserstein距离恰好能实现这一点。

items.en: Finally, the work of [3] shows new algorithms for calculating Wasserstein distances between different distributions. We believe this direction is quite important, and perhaps could lead to new ways of evaluating generative models.
items.zh: 最后，[3]的工作展示了计算不同分布之间Wasserstein距离的新算法。我们相信这一方向非常重要，或许能带来评估生成模型的新方法。

items.en: We introduced an algorithm that we deemed WGAN, an alternative to traditional GAN training. In this new model, we showed that we can improve the stability of learning, get rid of problems like mode collapse, and provide meaningful learning curves useful for debugging and hyperparameter searches. Furthermore, we showed that the corresponding optimization problem is sound, and provided extensive theoretical work highlighting the deep connections to other distances between distributions.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种称为WGAN的算法，作为传统GAN训练的替代方案。在这个新模型中，我们展示了可以改善学习的稳定性，消除模式崩溃等问题，并提供有意义的训练曲线，用于调试和超参数搜索。此外，我们证明了相应的优化问题是合理的，并提供了广泛的理论工作，突出了与其他分布距离之间的深层联系。
